strengths: 20 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure, and AI-agent tooling satisfies and exceeds the 15-year experience floor
Founder of GISCollective and early-stage startup roles demonstrate the entrepreneurial-within-larger-org profile explicitly preferred by the JD
Active contribution to MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq shows current, practical AI-builder credibility
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or related field; educational background is undergraduate CS and Fine Arts, not the Master's/PhD the role prefers
Career arc is execution-focused (individual contributor engineering, technical depth) with no evidence of strategic advisory, customer-facing thought leadership, or director-level IC scope
AI involvement is confined to the most recent role and is tooling-level rather than platform or product strategy; no recognized AI expertise, published research, or shipped AI product at scale
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings genuine engineering depth and entrepreneurial texture that partially address the role's experience requirements, but the position is fundamentally a director-level strategic and advisory IC role requiring recognized AI expertise, customer-facing influence, and product-level AI leadership — none of which appear substantively in his record. His AI work is recent and scoped to tooling rather than strategy, and his career shows no transition toward the external thought leadership or cross-organizational influence the role demands.
